---
title: "Exploring the chemical space of antiparasitic peptides and discovery of new promising leads through a novel approach based on network science and similarity searching"
description: | 
  This oral presentation was part of the International Society for Computational Biology Student Council Symposium 2022, held online.
date: "2022-07-09"
image: SCS_2022.png
categories:
- 👨‍🏫Oral presentation 
- 💊Drug discovery
- 🕸️Network science
- 🧬Bioinformatics
---
[{{< fa calendar-check >}} Event](https://scs2022.iscbsc.org/){.btn target=_blank} [{{< iconify ri slideshow-fill>}} Slides (English)](https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.6784416){.btn target=_blank} 

You can find more details about this project [here][amps-nets]. 

[amps-nets]: ../../projects/APPs_networks/
